attraction_name: Nanjing City Wall Taicheng Scenic Area
description: The best-preserved section of the Ming Dynasty city wall, where visitors can climb up to overlook the beautiful scenery of Xuanwu Lake.

attraction_name: Purple Mountain Observatory, Chinese Academy of Sciences
description: The birthplace of modern Chinese astronomy, offering panoramic views of Nanjing and serving as a science education base.
China's first national highest academic institution, a core scenic area of the Qinhuai River scenic belt, with well-preserved ancient architectural complexes.
A famous ancient temple in Nanjing, now a national revolutionary martyrs' cemetery, with a serene environment and the Linggu Pagoda as its landmark.
The mausoleum of Dr. Sun Yat-sen, a memorial site for the Father of the Republic of China, and a core attraction of the Zhongshan Scenic Area.
The official residence of Chiang Kai-shek and Soong Mei-ling, featuring French architectural style and known as the 'No. 1 Villa in the Far East.'
The largest imperial garden lake in China, known as the 'Pearl of Jinling,' offering different scenery throughout the seasons.
A preserved historical street district of Ming and Qing Dynasty architecture, blending traditional residences with modern commerce, providing an experience of old Nanjing's charm.
A sacred site commemorating the New Democratic Revolution in China, a solemn place to honor revolutionary martyrs.
The mausoleum of Zhu Yuanzhang, the founding emperor of the Ming Dynasty, a UNESCO World Heritage Site and a model of Ming and Qing imperial tombs in China.
A famous snack street in Nanjing, gathering authentic local delicacies and recommended by locals as a food destination.
A Ming Dynasty pavilion-style building, located at a high point along the Yangtze River with expansive views.
The site of an ancient Southern Dynasties temple, now a cemetery for fallen soldiers of the National Revolutionary Army, with the Linggu Pagoda as its iconic structure.

attraction_name: 12th District of Yihe Road Mansion Area
description: A cluster of mansions from the Republic of China era, a well-preserved historical district with elegant architectural styles.

attraction_name: Music Stage at Sun Yat-sen Mausoleum Scenic Area in Zhongshan Scenic Area
description: An open-air music stage built during the Republic of China period, featuring exquisite architecture and a tranquil surrounding environment.
A museum dedicated to the history and culture of the Six Dynasties, with a strong modern architectural design.
